hypothesis: Fine-tuning the pre-trained eSEN model with an active-learning loop that adds ≤200 DFT-labeled images sampled from early ML-SSNEB trajectories and uses a loss reweighted to prioritize stress components will reduce the model's stress mean absolute error by >50% and enable ML-only SSNEB to predict MEP energy barriers within 0.05 eV of full DFT SSNEB for both CsPbI3 and TiO2, obviating the need for DFT restarts.
